note: External integrations detected by hostname matching in custom app code. Per v0.2 Decision 18: vendor SDK wrappers live in apps/novizna_crm/novizna_crm/connectors/, orchestration in apps/novizna_crm/novizna_crm/api/.

orchestration_modules.note: Generic import / orchestration code lives here (NOT in connectors/).

invoice_ninja.note: Separate top-level app (not under novizna_crm). Has its own DocTypes (10) for Invoice Ninja company / mapping / sync logs. Custom fields on ERPNext doctypes via custom_fields.py.
